$comment: Canonical English catalog. Edit this first when adding keys. All other locales mirror this shape. Use {name} for interpolation. Do not translate brand names: Aniseekr, AniList, MyAnimeList, Bangumi, Kitsu, Simkl.

language.screenSubtitle: App chrome and how anime data is shown
language.appLanguageSubtitle: Choose the language for app UI
language.titlePriorityDesc: Order in which title languages are tried for each anime
language.vocabLanguageDesc: Defaults to App language. Override to mix languages.
language.autotranslateSynopsisDesc: Translate descriptions on device when no localized version exists
language.showOriginalDesc: Display original text below the translation. Long-press any translated string to toggle on the fly.
language.helpTranslateBody: Aniseekr is open source — translations are community contributions. See CONTRIBUTING.md for how to add or improve a language.

welcome.tagline: Discover, rate, collect. Locally on your device.
welcome.subtitle: No account needed.

browseSource.title: Pick your browse source
browseSource.body: Aniseekr pulls top, seasonal, and search results from the platform you choose. You can change this later in Settings.

notifications.title: Get airing reminders?
notifications.body: We can ping you a few minutes before tracked shows go live. Stays local — no third party involved.

adult.title: Show R18 entries?
adult.body: When off, adult-rated entries are hidden across lists and search. You can flip this any time from Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.longPressHint: Long-press a row for quick actions

prefs.allowR18Desc: Show 18+ entries in seasonal lists and search
prefs.includeGamesDesc: Show video games in Bangumi calendar

accentColor.subtitle: Choose an accent color used across buttons, tabs, and highlights throughout Aniseekr.
accentColor.title: Accent Color

accountScreen.disconnectAllDesc: Signs out of every platform and erases all stored OAuth tokens locally
accountScreen.footnote: Aniseekr has no server-side account — your library lives only on this device. Disconnecting a platform removes its OAuth token and the cached library it pulled. To fully delete data on each platform, revoke access in that platform's account settings. To erase every local cache, screenshot, preference and SQLite store as well, delete the app from your device.
accountScreen.intro: Connect platforms to sync your library, ratings and progress across Aniseekr and other clients.
accountScreen.refreshTokensDesc: Re-pull authentication state from secure storage

advanced.cameraDiagnosticsDesc: Hardware capabilities + cohort classification for bug reports
advanced.importWizardDesc: Bulk-import from MAL or AniList exports
advanced.languageDesc: App language, title priority, and translation
advanced.subtitle: Beta and diagnostic features
advanced.title: Advanced

appearance.cardHeightDesc: Adjusts Bangumi calendar and Rate cards.
appearance.livePreviewDesc: Accent and surface tints update as you tap.
appearance.mapHint: Pilgrimage map theme. Defaults to light — most maps look better that way.

attributionScreen.footer: Trademarks belong to their respective owners. Aniseekr is not affiliated with any of the services listed above.
attributionScreen.intro: Aniseekr aggregates information from these excellent sources. Tap any entry to open the project page.

source.anilist: Primary anime metadata, scoring, and seasonal listings
source.carto: Voyager / Positron / Dark Matter raster tiles for the pilgrimage map
source.jikan: Open MAL REST mirror for cross-platform fallback
source.osm: Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, available under the ODbL

attributionScreen.subtitle: The data and tools we stand on

backupScreen.autoBackupDesc: Run automatically every {hours}h when the app goes to background
backupScreen.cloudkitPullDesc: Only pulls folders the old app explicitly shared. For full restore, use the section above.
backupScreen.cloudkitPushDesc: So the old SwiftUI app on another device sees the same data
backupScreen.cloudkitUnavailable: Not available — rebuild dev client with the bridge
backupScreen.encryptDesc: AES-256-GCM with a device key. Required to restore on the same device.

google.signInPrompt: Sign in to enable Google Drive backup.
google.signedIn: Signed in. Backup file lives in the hidden app-data folder of your Google Drive.

backupScreen.googleNotConfigured: Set EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_DRIVE_WEB_CLIENT_ID in .env to enable Google Drive backup.
backupScreen.icloudDesc: Native to iPhone — no sign-in needed

legacy.detected: Legacy aniseeker migration data detected ({total} items).
legacy.explainer: This is the minimal ratings / watch progress data left by the old SwiftUI app. The import previews the diff first; once imported this section will not appear again.
legacy.importCta: Import and overwrite rows with the same id
legacy.title: Import from legacy aniseeker

backupScreen.restoreLegacyDesc: Paste migration JSON if you extracted it manually

scope.driveAppData: Stored in Drive's app-data folder (hidden, app-private)
scope.driveRoot: Stored in your Drive root (visible in drive.google.com)
scope.icloudDocuments: Stored in iCloud Drive · Aniseekr (visible in Files.app)
scope.icloudPrivate: Stored in the app-private iCloud container (hidden)

status.icloudUnavailable: iCloud not available — check Settings → Apple ID

backupScreen.subtitle: iCloud · Google Drive · CloudKit

cacheScreen.cacheDirDesc: Images, temporary files, and preloaded data
cacheScreen.docDirDesc: User data; never cleared by cache actions
cacheScreen.pruneExpiredDesc: Only clears TTL-based cache entries that are already expired
cacheScreen.subtitle: Manage offline data and storage usage

customColor.recentEmpty: Apply a color to see it here.
customColor.title: Custom Color

dataSourceScreen.description: Select the platform used to power discovery and seasonal browsing. This does not change which platforms sync your library.
dataSourceScreen.title: Browse Source

merge.desc: Keep existing scores; add anything missing
merge.label: Merge

overwrite.desc: Replace local data with the imported file
overwrite.label: Overwrite

skip.desc: Only import series not already in your library
skip.label: Skip duplicates

importWizard.note: Importing copies the file into the local cache, validates each row, and writes new entries via the collection service. You can cancel mid-flight without affecting your current library.

anilist.desc: Use the official "Export user data" download
anilist.name: AniList JSON

csv.desc: Generic CSV with title / score / status columns
csv.name: CSV file

kitsu.desc: JSON export from your Kitsu account settings
kitsu.name: Kitsu library

mal.desc: Standard MAL export, includes scores and notes
mal.name: MyAnimeList XML

importWizard.subtitle: Bring your existing library across
importWizard.title: Import wizard

notificationsScreen.achievementAlertsDesc: Local pings when you earn a badge
notificationsScreen.androidFootnote: Android schedules reminders via the local AlarmManager. They run even if the app is closed, but battery optimisations may delay them by a few minutes on some devices.

banner.body: Allow notifications so we can remind you when episodes drop.
banner.title: Notifications are off

notificationsScreen.episodeRemindersDesc: Notify me before each new episode
notificationsScreen.subtitle: {count} scheduled · {status}

privacyScreen.lead: Aniseekr is built on the principle that your library belongs to you.

advertising.body: We show AdMob ads in some surfaces. We do not present an App Tracking Transparency (ATT) prompt, so AdMob operates without IDFA — ads are non-personalized and attribution uses Apple's privacy-preserving SKAdNetwork. Google may still collect device-level signals; see Google's privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy.
advertising.title: Advertising (Google AdMob)

analytics.body: We use Microsoft Clarity to understand how users interact with the app — taps, scroll depth, screen views, anonymized session recordings. Sensitive text fields are masked; OAuth tokens and PII are never recorded. Microsoft processes the data under its own privacy statement.
analytics.title: Usage analytics (Microsoft Clarity)

camera.body: The pilgrimage comparison flow uses the camera to capture a scene and, with your permission, saves it to your Photos library so you can share it later. We do not upload photos. EXIF (including GPS, if present) is stripped before saving comparison shots.
camera.title: Camera & photos

children.body: Aniseekr is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from them. If you believe a child has provided data, contact us and we will remove it.
children.title: Children's privacy

control.body: You can clear caches, delete folders, disconnect platforms, or revoke camera / photo / location / notification permissions at any time in iOS / Android settings. Uninstalling the app removes all locally stored data. Cleared data cannot be recovered.
control.title: Your data, your control

crash.body: Crash logs surface only as on-device console output and never leave your phone unless you choose to share them.
crash.title: Crash reports

location.body: Pilgrimage features use your location only while you have the screen open to filter nearby anime spots. Coordinates stay on the device — they are never sent to our servers. Always-on background location is not requested.
location.title: Location

notifications.body: Episode and achievement reminders are scheduled locally by iOS / Android — we do not push them from a server. We may register an Apple Push (APNs) or FCM token so the OS can deliver them, but the payload is generated on your device. Disabling notifications system-wide stops all reminders immediately.
notifications.title: Notifications

storeLocal.body: Aniseekr keeps your folders, ratings, theme choices, notification preferences, and OAuth tokens (in Keychain / EncryptedSharedPreferences) on your device. We do not run a backend, so nothing is uploaded to our servers.
storeLocal.title: What we store locally

thirdParty.body: When you connect AniList, MyAnimeList, Bangumi, Annict, Shikimori, Simkl, or Kitsu, requests go directly between your device and that platform. We do not proxy or log those requests. Disconnecting an account in Settings stops all syncing.
thirdParty.title: Third-party platforms

privacyScreen.subtitle: What happens to your data

syncHubScreen.backgroundSyncDesc: Periodic updates when the app is open
syncHubScreen.cloudBackupDesc: iCloud · Google Drive — full library snapshot

newest.desc: Pick whichever side has the latest update timestamp
newest.label: Newest wins

syncHubScreen.forceResyncDesc: Wipes local cache and re-pulls everything
syncHubScreen.statusBody: Sync runs in the background when your library changes.
syncHubScreen.subtitle: Cross-platform syncing

termsScreen.lead: By using Aniseekr you agree to the following terms.

acceptableUse.body: Aniseekr is provided for personal, non-commercial use. Do not abuse the bundled API integrations or attempt to bypass platform-level rate limits.
acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use

ads.body: Some surfaces may display ads from third-party networks. We are not responsible for ad content; your interactions with ads are subject to the advertiser's terms.
ads.title: Advertisements

changes.body: We may update these terms occasionally. The effective date below reflects the most recent revision; please re-read this page after major updates.
changes.title: Changes

content.body: Anime metadata, screenshots, and scoring information remain the property of their respective platforms. Aniseekr displays this content for personal reference only.
content.title: Content

credentials.body: You are responsible for OAuth tokens stored on your device. Logging out removes them from local secure storage; revoking access on the third-party site is recommended for full removal.
credentials.title: Account credentials

noWarranty.body: The app is provided "as is". While we strive for accuracy, third-party data sources may be unavailable or out of date.
noWarranty.title: No warranty

subscriptions.body:
Aniseekr Pro offers the following in-app purchases through Apple:

• Aniseekr Pro Monthly — auto-renewing subscription, billed every month.
• Aniseekr Pro Annual — auto-renewing subscription, billed every year.
• Aniseekr Pro Lifetime — one-time purchase, never renews.

Payment and billing: Payment is charged to your Apple ID at confirmation of purchase. Auto-renewing subscriptions automatically renew at the same price unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your Apple ID will be charged for the next period within 24 hours of the period end. The current price is shown in the paywall before you confirm.

Managing and cancelling: You can review, manage, or cancel any subscription at any time in your Apple ID account settings (Settings → [your name] → Subscriptions on iOS). Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period; you keep Pro features until then.

Refunds: Purchases are handled by Apple and are subject to Apple's standard refund policy. We cannot issue refunds directly; please contact Apple Support to request one.

Restoring purchases: Tap "Restore purchases" on the paywall to restore an existing entitlement on a new device or after reinstalling.
subscriptions.title: Subscriptions and in-app purchases

termsScreen.subtitle: Ground rules for using Aniseekr

watchPlatformsScreen.footnote: Your picks live on this device only — there's no Aniseekr server holding them.
watchPlatformsScreen.intro: Pick where you actually watch — those platforms show up first on every anime, and we'll deep-link straight into the app when it's installed.
watchPlatformsScreen.openInAppDesc: Try the platform's app via deep-link before falling back to the web URL.
